name: Seedance
description: ByteDance Seedance - detailed motion descriptions for best results
examplePrompts: A young man in a leather jacket turns around slowly, wind blowing his hair. Urban rooftop at sunset. Warm golden hour tones, anamorphic lens flare.
A cat jumps gracefully from one shelf to another, knocking over a small plant. Cozy living room with warm lighting. Photorealistic, 35mm film look.
Waves crash against jagged rocks in slow motion, mist rising into the air. Dramatic coastal cliff at dawn. Epic wide angle, desaturated teal and orange.
